name: print-upscale-studio
description: All-in-one local desktop toolkit with bundled Upscayl NCNN/Vulkan runtime, restoration, logo vectorization and print-text enhancement.
author: Min

scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test:smoke
scripts.dist:win: npm run runtime:fetch -- --platform win32 --arch x64 && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win nsis portable --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:x64: npm run runtime:fetch -- --platform darwin --arch x64 && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dmg zip --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: npm run runtime:fetch -- --platform darwin --arch arm64 && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dmg zip --arm64 --publish never
